'''鈭歞h-s-v''' ('''dhasava''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:ethicise|ethicise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-s-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ethicise|ethicise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞h-s-v
|-
! Lemma
| dhasava
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhasavithi|dhasavithi]] || [[word:dhasaviji|dhasaviji]] || [[word:dhasavishi|dhasavishi]] || [[word:dhasavi|dhasavi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhasavuthuth|dhasavuthuth]] || [[word:dhasavujuj|dhasavujuj]] || [[word:dhasavushush|dhasavushush]] || [[word:dhasav|dhasav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhasavuthu|dhasavuthu]] || [[word:dhasavuju|dhasavuju]] || [[word:dhasavushu|dhasavushu]] || [[word:dhasavu|dhasavu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhasavufuth|dhasavufuth]] || [[word:dhasavufuj|dhasavufuj]] || [[word:dhasavufush|dhasavufush]] || [[word:dhasavuf|dhasavuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhasavethe|dhasavethe]] || [[word:dhasaveje|dhasaveje]] || [[word:dhasaveshe|dhasaveshe]] || [[word:dhasave|dhasave]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhasavothoth|dhasavothoth]] || [[word:dhasavojoj|dhasavojoj]] || [[word:dhasavoshosh|dhasavoshosh]] || [[word:dhasav|dhasav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhasavotho|dhasavotho]] || [[word:dhasavojo|dhasavojo]] || [[word:dhasavosho|dhasavosho]] || [[word:dhasavo|dhasavo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhasavofoth|dhasavofoth]] || [[word:dhasavofoj|dhasavofoj]] || [[word:dhasavofosh|dhasavofosh]] || [[word:dhasavof|dhasavof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhasav忙th忙|dhasav忙th忙]] || [[word:dhasav忙j忙|dhasav忙j忙]] || [[word:dhasav忙sh忙|dhasav忙sh忙]] || [[word:dhasav忙|dhasav忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhasavathath|dhasavathath]] || [[word:dhasavajaj|dhasavajaj]] || [[word:dhasavashash|dhasavashash]] || [[word:dhasav|dhasav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhasavatha|dhasavatha]] || [[word:dhasavaja|dhasavaja]] || [[word:dhasavasha|dhasavasha]] || [[word:dhasava|dhasava]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhasavafath|dhasavafath]] || [[word:dhasavafaj|dhasavafaj]] || [[word:dhasavafash|dhasavafash]] || [[word:dhasavaf|dhasavaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:dhasavasha|dhasavasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:godhasavasha|godhasavasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokidhasavasha|gokidhasavasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:dhasavn眉sha|dhasavn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:godhasavnkn眉sha|godhasavnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokidhasavn眉sha|gokidhasavn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dhasavsh毛sha|dhasavsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhasavnksh毛sha|godhasavnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidhasavsh毛sha|gokidhasavsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhasavrosha|dhasavrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhasavnkrosha|godhasavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidhasavrosha|gokidhasavrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhasavmusha|dhasavmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:godhasavnkmusha|godhasavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhasavmusha|gokidhasavmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:dhasavsherasha|dhasavsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:godhasavnksherasha|godhasavnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokidhasavsherasha|gokidhasavsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:dhasavngasha|dhasavngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:godhasavnkngasha|godhasavnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokidhasavngasha|gokidhasavngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhasavyasha|dhasavyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:godhasavnkyasha|godhasavnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokidhasavyasha|gokidhasavyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:dhasavyamasha|dhasavyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:godhasavnkyamasha|godhasavnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokidhasavyamasha|gokidhasavyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:dhasavn眉sh毛sha|dhasavn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:godhasavnkn眉sh毛sha|godhasavnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidhasavn眉sh毛sha|gokidhasavn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhasavn眉rosha|dhasavn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhasavnkn眉rosha|godhasavnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidhasavn眉rosha|gokidhasavn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhasavn眉musha|dhasavn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhasavnkn眉musha|godhasavnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhasavn眉musha|gokidhasavn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:dhasavsh毛n眉sha|dhasavsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:godhasavnksh毛n眉sha|godhasavnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidhasavsh毛n眉sha|gokidhasavsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhasavsh毛rosha|dhasavsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhasavnksh毛rosha|godhasavnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidhasavsh毛rosha|gokidhasavsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhasavsh毛musha|dhasavsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhasavnksh毛musha|godhasavnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhasavsh毛musha|gokidhasavsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:dhasavron眉sha|dhasavron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:godhasavnkron眉sha|godhasavnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidhasavron眉sha|gokidhasavron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:dhasavrosh毛sha|dhasavrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:godhasavnkrosh毛sha|godhasavnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidhasavrosh毛sha|gokidhasavrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhasavromusha|dhasavromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhasavnkromusha|godhasavnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhasavromusha|gokidhasavromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:dhasavmun眉sha|dhasavmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:godhasavnkmun眉sha|godhasavnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidhasavmun眉sha|gokidhasavmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:dhasavmush毛sha|dhasavmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:godhasavnkmush毛sha|godhasavnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidhasavmush毛sha|gokidhasavmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhasavmurosha|dhasavmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhasavnkmurosha|godhasavnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidhasavmurosha|gokidhasavmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:dhasav|dhasav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:dh忙s忙v|dh忙s忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hodhasav|hodhasav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hodh忙s忙v|hodh忙s忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohodhasav|hohodhasav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohodh忙s忙v|hohodh忙s忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉dhasav|n眉dhasav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉dh忙s忙v|n眉dh忙s忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉dhasav|n眉n眉dhasav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉dh忙s忙v|n眉n眉dh忙s忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂dhasav|n茂dhasav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂dh忙s忙v|n茂dh忙s忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂dhasav|n茂n茂dhasav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂dh忙s忙v|n茂n茂dh忙s忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:ludhasav|ludhasav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ludh忙s忙v|ludh忙s忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luludhasav|luludhasav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luludh忙s忙v|luludh忙s忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lidhasav|lidhasav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lidh忙s忙v|lidh忙s忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilidhasav|lilidhasav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilidh忙s忙v|lilidh忙s忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kodhasav|kodhasav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kodh忙s忙v|kodh忙s忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokodhasav|kokodhasav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokodh忙s忙v|kokodh忙s忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kedhasav|kedhasav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kedh忙s忙v|kedh忙s忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekedhasav|kekedhasav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekedh忙s忙v|kekedh忙s忙v]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|59e8839}}
